name: dmk
description: Skills for integrating the Ledger DMK — the TypeScript SDK for communicating with Ledger hardware wallets.

skills.name: dmk-intent-vocabulary
skills.description: Maps natural language to DMK API methods

skills.name: dmk-implementation
skills.description: 5-step execution process with HITL gates and error classification

skills.name: dmk-business-logic
skills.description: Domain concepts: Clear Signing, Secure Channel, sessions, transports
